metadata.raw: {"ID":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/uksi/2025/1352","TITLE":"The Online Safety Act 2023 (Priority Offences) (Amendment) Regulations 2025","LINK (SELF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/uksi/2025/1352","LINK":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/made","LINK (XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/made/data.xml","LINK (XML - Cymru)":"","LINK (RDF/XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/made/data.rdf","LINK (RDF/XML - Cymru)":"","LINK (AKN)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/made/data.akn","LINK (AKN - Cymru)":"","LINK (HTML snippet)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/made/data.xht","LINK (HTML snippet - Cymru)":"","LINK (HTML5 snippet - Cymru)":"","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/made/data.htm","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View - Cymru)":"","LINK (PDF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/made/data.pdf","LINK (PDF - Cymru)":"","LINK (Table of Contents)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2025/1352/contents/made","LINK (Table of Contents - Cymru)":"","AUTHOR":"","UPDATED":"2025-12-22T03:08:46Z","PUBLISHED":"2025-12-22T03:03:48.264964Z","DocumentMainType":"UnitedKingdomStatutoryInstrument","YEAR":"2025","NUMBER":"1352","ISBN":"'9780348277999'","AlternativeNumber":"","CreationDate":"2025-12-18","SUBJECT":"ELECTRONIC COMMUNICATIONS","Supersedes":"","CATEGORY":"ELECTRONIC COMMUNICATIONS","SUMMARY":"These Regulations amend the priority offences set out in Schedule 7 to the Online Safety Act 2023 (c. 50) (“the Act”). Criminal offences listed in Schedule 7 to the Act are made ‘priority offences’ by section 59(7)(c) of the Act. Part 3 of the Act imposes duties on providers of certain internet services in relation to priority offences and content which amounts to these offences.","":""}
